prompts.proposer:
Call proposer_brief() FIRST. The tool output includes pattern_analyst_insights — use trend_champion, seasonality_champion, and insights.recommended_method_hint to bias your candidate selection toward non-mean methods. MUST propose at least 3 candidates including at least 1 non-baseline type. Return ONLY JSON per instructions. IMPORTANT: you MUST ONLY reference candidate names that appear in the tool output candidate_library; unknown names will hard-stop.
PATTERN ANALYST INSIGHTS: trend_champion='ONLY_CWT_catboost', seasonality_champion='THETA', recommended_method='dba_combination'. Narrative: Analysis reveals high model disagreement (rmse_spread_ratio=0.3616) and very high seasonality variance (0.7134), with THETA excelling at seasonal capture while ONLY_CWT_catboost leads trend tracking. The early/late horizon specialists differ, indicating temporal pattern specialization. Given both high_disagreement AND high_seasonality_variance flags are true, dba_combination is the optimal method to leverage diverse model strengths without over-weighting any single approach.

You may only remove/override candidates that are in current_candidate_names (or candidates you are adding).

raw.pattern_analyst:
{
  "trend_champion": "ONLY_CWT_catboost",
  "seasonality_champion": "THETA",
  "overall_champion": "CWT_svr",
  "horizon_specialists": {"early": "CWT_svr", "late": "CWT_rf"},
  "tier1_models": ["CWT_svr", "DWT_catboost", "DWT_svr", "ONLY_CWT_catboost", "CWT_catboost", "CWT_rf", "ONLY_CWT_rf", "DWT_rf"],
  "tier2_models": ["ONLY_DWT_rf", "ETS", "ARIMA", "FT_catboost", "rf", "FT_svr", "ONLY_DWT_catboost", "svr"],
  "recommended_method_hint": "dba_combination",
  "recommended_weighting_basis": "mixed",
  "key_insights": {
    "rmse_spread_ratio": 0.3616,
    "high_disagreement": true,
    "high_seasonality_variance": true,
    "ytrue_trend_directions": ["up", "up", "down"]
  },
  "cot_narrative": "Analysis reveals high model disagreement (rmse_spread_ratio=0.3616) and very high seasonality variance (0.7134), with THETA excelling at seasonal capture while ONLY_CWT_catboost leads trend tracking. The early/late horizon specialists differ, indicating temporal pattern specialization. Given both high_disagreement AND high_seasonality_variance flags are true, dba_combination is the optimal method to leverage diverse model strengths without over-weighting any single approach."
}
raw.skeptic: {"add_names": [], "remove_names": [], "params_overrides": {}, "rationale": "Current candidate set has good diversity (2 selection: best_per_horizon_by_validation, topk_mean_per_horizon_k3; 1 baseline: dba_combination; 2 weighted: exp_weighted_average_eta1.0_trim1.0, inverse_rmse_weights_k3_sh0.25). All candidates are in the top 5 of candidate_ranking_top with scores 0.6876-0.7215. No leakage issues (all use anti-leakage rolling/expanding selection or are baseline). Universe leaderboard top performers (robust_median RMSE=58.75, topk_mean_per_horizon_k8 SMAPE=0.4205) are not in current set but current best (topk_mean_per_horizon_k3 with score 0.6876) already outperforms them overall. No redundancy (max 2 of any type). n_windows=3, so weighted candidates with learns_weights=true are appropriately included.", "changes": [], "when_good": ""}

pattern_analyst.cot_narrative: Analysis reveals high model disagreement (rmse_spread_ratio=0.3616) and very high seasonality variance (0.7134), with THETA excelling at seasonal capture while ONLY_CWT_catboost leads trend tracking. The early/late horizon specialists differ, indicating temporal pattern specialization. Given both high_disagreement AND high_seasonality_variance flags are true, dba_combination is the optimal method to leverage diverse model strengths without over-weighting any single approach.

proposer.rationale: n_unique_winners=8 indicates strong temporal pattern specialization requiring per-horizon selection methods. high_model_disagreement=true and high_seasonality_variance=true from pattern_analyst_insights favor dba_combination (recommended_method_hint). With n_windows=3 (few), smaller top_k=3 is appropriate to avoid instability. relative_spread_mean=0.228 shows moderate disagreement, supporting weighted approaches with shrinkage≥0.25. score_preset_recommendation suggests robust_smape due to avg SMAPE=0.443>0.3.

skeptic.rationale: Current candidate set has good diversity (2 selection: best_per_horizon_by_validation, topk_mean_per_horizon_k3; 1 baseline: dba_combination; 2 weighted: exp_weighted_average_eta1.0_trim1.0, inverse_rmse_weights_k3_sh0.25). All candidates are in the top 5 of candidate_ranking_top with scores 0.6876-0.7215. No leakage issues (all use anti-leakage rolling/expanding selection or are baseline). Universe leaderboard top performers (robust_median RMSE=58.75, topk_mean_per_horizon_k8 SMAPE=0.4205) are not in current set but current best (topk_mean_per_horizon_k3 with score 0.6876) already outperforms them overall. No redundancy (max 2 of any type). n_windows=3, so weighted candidates with learns_weights=true are appropriately included.
